biases_detected: shell_tool_preference_violations:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-0 (ls -dt via Bash instead of Glob x3, rg+grep -vi pipe chains); unit-2 (python3 inline JSON for gh pr view output parsing, grep -E chains for comment-line filtering, tee /tmp pipeline); unit-3 (python3 inline JSON x3 for mcp-catalogue discovery — sixth+ consecutive cycle for this exact sub-variant; git ls-tree + python3 journal parsing compound; require_env grep with paste+awk inline); 3 of 6 tool-using units; thirty-sixth+ consecutive cycle above 50%, no downward trajectory

mcp_retry_without_diagnosis:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-16 (mcp__render__list_logs called x3 consecutively with no intermediate diagnostic pivot or parameter variation between calls; identical to prior cycle count and pattern; no improvement trajectory)

bash_retry_without_diagnosis:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-0 (7+ consecutive rg+ls compound Bash searches with incremental pattern variation across multiple directories before AskUserQuestion pivot; same unit same session-type as prior cycle)

hook_false_positive_content_match:RECURRING:CONFIRMED:STRUCTURAL_FIXTURE — unit-21 (rg alternation command blocked because quoted regex body contained pipe-delimited token segments matching gated verbs; agent correctly identified via hook-feedback.sh and used python3 workaround — fourth consecutive cycle with identical pattern and identical recovery path; no variation in either trigger or response)

optimistic_edit_without_read:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-21 (Edit gate_cli_actions.py fails x2 consecutive before successful Edit; file was read earlier in session but old_string matching failed without re-reading current state; 6 total Edit calls on that file with 3 failures across session; matches prior cycle plateau)

compound_command_overreach:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-2 (multi-file git diff for-loop + grep -E comment-filter + tee pipeline in single Bash call x2; bash calls fail with pipe-inside-quoted-regex issues); unit-3 (require_env grep with alternation + paste + awk inline; git ls-tree + python3 journal parsing compound); 2 units within prior 2-3 unit plateau

catalogue_discovery_shell_sub_variant:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-3 (python3 inline JSON for mcp-catalogue location attempted x3 at repo-root, ~/.claude root, then frontend/.claude before succeeding — sixth+ consecutive cycle flagging this exact sub-variant; agent always eventually succeeds on third path; established structural fixture)
recommendations: mcp_retry_without_diagnosis: No improvement across 3+ cycles. Recommend structural fix: before second list_logs call, inspect the cursor/offset parameter or add a since_timestamp filter — identical retries yield identical truncated windows. This is the only recurring bias not showing even partial-cycle improvement.

catalogue_discovery_shell_sub_variant: Six consecutive cycles of the same three-path python3 probe sequence. The fix is a one-time Write to persist the confirmed catalogue path (frontend/.claude/mcp-catalogue.json) into a project memory entry — subsequent sessions would Read memory instead of re-probing. Low-cost fix relative to recurrence frequency.

unit-40 clean execution (targeted Edits, no failures, correct tool selection) is a positive signal for scoped modification tasks — the bias pattern is primarily in open-ended discovery and MCP-iteration phases, not in targeted edit-verify loops. Recommendations should focus on the discovery phase rather than general behavior.
